config_boundary_repair_evidence: src/config.js now normalizes clean.safe and clean.risky entries to raw runtime-planning metadata only: {kind, rawPath} plus optional description. It no longer resolves paths, checks existence or canonical paths, or emits clean safety refusal decisions during config load. Task cwd/log containment validation remains unchanged.
clean_safety_contract_evidence: Targeted clean/config tests pass. loadConfig preserves '.', '..', and absolute clean entries; resolveCleanTargets produces refused plans for unsafe targets; CLI clean safety tests confirm refused targets do not delete approved targets.
